description:
Create and deploy a NextGen Connect channel named 'Canonical_XML_Transformer'. The channel must receive HL7 v2.x ADT messages on TCP port 6661 (MLLP) and write them as transformed XML files to '/home/ga/xml_out/'.

Required XML Output Structure:
<PatientEvent source="NextGen">
    <MRN>{PID-3.1}</MRN>
    <PatientName>
        <Family>{PID-5.1}</Family>
        <Given>{PID-5.2}</Given>
    </PatientName>
    <Gender>{Normalized Gender}</Gender>
    <EventTimestamp>{EVN-2}</EventTimestamp>
</PatientEvent>

Required Transformation Logic:
